metadata.seed: It's about the same. I'm still feeling pretty down. I mean, I just. I feel really stuck and not happy, and I just don't know why.

I'm just going through the motions

patient.query: I mean, there have been times, like when I got a compliment at work for a project I did. For a moment, it felt nice, like I was really contributing. But then I just started thinking about how, what if that was just luck or they were being nice because they had to be? It makes it hard to hold on to those good feelings.

automatic_thoughts: what if that was just luck
they were being nice because they had to be

Sometimes I feel like I don’t really belong, you know? So when someone says something nice, I just wonder if they really mean it or if they’re just trying to be polite.

patient.query: Yeah, I guess I can think of a few times. There was this presentation I did last month. I was so nervous, and I could feel my hands shaking. I thought nobody would get what I was saying, and I just felt like I was wasting everyone’s time. But afterward, a couple of people came up and said they found it really helpful. It’s just hard to believe that sometimes. It feels like they’re just being nice, not actual praise.

I am wasting everyone’s time
they're just being nice, not actual praise
